description: Illustrative example accompanying the JOSS paper OptimalControl.jl: A Julia package for modeling and solving optimal control problems with ODEs. This companion repository provides a self-contained Julia script that solves a constrained energy-minimization optimal control problem, combining a direct transcription method (solved with IPOPT) with an indirect shooting method based on Pontryagin's Maximum Principle. The direct solution is used to identify the three-arc structure (unconstrained-constrained-unconstrained) and to initialize the shooting. See OptimalControl.jl for the package itself.
title: joss-oc-example: illustrative example companion to the OptimalControl.jl JOSS paper

creators.affiliation: Université Côte d'Azur, CNRS, Inria, LJAD, France
